title: Very Optimized FPS Boost (VOFB)
description: This is my first modpack ever. Please give support if you like it, this modpack will help your slow or low end laptop or Pc get a slightly insane fps boost. example, 24 to 47 fps, all the way up to  56 to 81 fps.
body:
This is my first modpack ever. Please give support if you like it

This Modpack is meant for Minecraft Users/Players who have a very Low-End or slow Laptop or PC, for example
 
: Laptop
Cpu: Intel® Pentium® Silver N5030 × 4
Ram: 4 GB
GPU: iGPU (No GPU)
FPS: 49-72 (in some cases 142)

I've used a handful of mods, like Sodium, Lithium, and so on.
I also added a texture pack that might help, but don't rely on it too much.
The default settings for this modpack are set to the lowest possible, except for the chunk count (6-8 chunks).  


(Btw, the Discord server invite is not my server, I just want my friends' server to grow. If you want to talk to me on the server, find someone named "SomeoneStoleMyToast" thanks)
